---
title: "scMutiomics: ATAC-seq analysis"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-31"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(Seurat)
library(Signac)
library(ggplot2)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(dplyr)
library(readxl)
library(reshape2)
library(tidyverse)
library(MuDataSeurat, lib.loc = "~/R/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu-library/4.3/")
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(effsize,lib.loc = "~/R/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu-library/4.3/")
library(colorRamp2)
library(Hmisc)
library(corrplot)

TKO_final_arc <- readRDS("/oak/stanford/scg/lab_julsage/Debbie/multiome_data/analysis_2/TKO_final_arc.rds")

# Assuming your data frame is called 'df'
TKO_final_arc@meta.data <- TKO_final_arc@meta.data %>%
  mutate(cell_type = case_when(
    archaetype == "Generalist" & old.ident %in% c("NE_1", "NE_2", "NE_3", "NE_4", "NE_5", "NE_6", "NE_7", "NE_8", "NE_9", "NE_10") ~ "Generalist NE",
    archaetype == "Generalist" & old.ident  %in% c("Club cells_1", "Club cells_2", "AT2 cells", "Club cells_3", "Cilliated cells","Endothelial cells")  ~ "Generalist nonNE",
    TRUE ~ archaetype
  ))
```

```{r width = 3, fig.height = 4}
#Chromatin heatmap
Idents(TKO_final_arc) = "cell_type"
DefaultAssay(TKO_final_arc) <- "peaks"

#Importing differential peaks
TKO_diff_peaks <- read_csv("/labs/julsage/Debbie/multiome_data/analysis_2/Tables/TKO_diff_peaks.csv") #Supplementary Table S4

Peaks = AverageExpression(
  TKO_final_arc,
  assays = "peaks",
  features = TKO_diff_peaks$gene,
  return.seurat = TRUE,
  group.by = "ident",
  add.ident = NULL,
  layer = "data",
  verbose = TRUE)

peaks_mat = as.matrix(Peaks@assays$peaks$data)

library(circlize)
col_fun = colorRamp2(c(-1.5,0, 1.5), c("#1f7bbb", "#f7f7f7","#b50c0c"))
col_fun(seq(-1.5, 1.5))
## [1] "#00FF00FF" "#00FF00FF" "#B1FF9AFF" "#FFFFFFFF" "#FF9E81FF" "#FF0000FF"
## [7] "#FF0000FF"
scaled_mat = t(scale(t(peaks_mat)))

###Figure 3a
Heatmap(scaled_mat, name = "mat",col = col_fun,show_row_names = FALSE,row_dend_reorder = TRUE, clustering_distance_columns  = "pearson", row_km = 2, color_space = "RGB")

#generating consititutive peakset 
# open in all <20% of all cell types

assay_data    <- GetAssayData(TKO_final_arc, assay = "peaks", slot = "counts")
cell_clusters <- Idents(TKO_final_arc)

# Compute per-cluster fraction of cells with peak accessible
pct_matrix <- sapply(levels(cell_clusters), function(cl) {
  cells_in_cl <- names(cell_clusters)[cell_clusters == cl]
  rowMeans(assay_data[, cells_in_cl] > 0)
})

# Peaks accessible in ≥20% of cells in EVERY cluster
min_pct <- 0.20
constitutive_peaks <- rownames(pct_matrix)[
  apply(pct_matrix, 1, function(x) all(x >= min_pct))
]

Peaks_background = AverageExpression(
  TKO_final_arc,
  assays = "peaks",
  features = constitutive_peaks,
  return.seurat = TRUE,
  group.by = "ident",
  add.ident = NULL,
  layer = "data",
  verbose = TRUE)

peaks_bg_mat = as.matrix(Peaks_background@assays$peaks$data)

library(circlize)
col_fun = colorRamp2(c(-1.5,0, 1.5), c("#1f7bbb", "#f7f7f7","#b50c0c"))
col_fun(seq(-1.5, 1.5))
## [1] "#00FF00FF" "#00FF00FF" "#B1FF9AFF" "#FFFFFFFF" "#FF9E81FF" "#FF0000FF"
## [7] "#FF0000FF"
scaled_bg_mat = t(scale(t(peaks_bg_mat)))

###Extended Data Figure 7b
Heatmap(scaled_bg_mat, name = "mat",col = col_fun,show_row_names = FALSE,row_dend_reorder = TRUE, clustering_distance_columns  = "pearson", row_km = 2, color_space = "RGB")

```

```{r width = 3, fig.height = 4}
DefaultAssay(TKO_final_arc) <- "peaks"

# ── Define ident_order FIRST before anything else ─────────────────────────────
ident_order <- c("Neuroendocrine1", "Neuroendocrine2", "Stress",
                 "Generalist NE", "Intermediate",
                  "nonNE1", "nonNE2","Generalist nonNE"
                )

group_colors <- c(
  "Neuroendocrine1"  = "#cb76da",
  "Neuroendocrine2"  = "#a855b5",
  "Generalist NE"    = "#2ecc71",
  "Generalist nonNE" = "#f5d400",
  "Intermediate"     = "#f5a623",
  "nonNE1"           = "#f10c13",
  "nonNE2"           = "#c00000",
  "Stress"           = "#4a90d9"
)

# ── 1. Get top 50 peaks per archetype ─────────────────────────────────────────
top_peaks <- TKO_diff_peaks %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  arrange(desc(avg_log2FC)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 50) %>%
  ungroup()

print(table(top_peaks$cluster))

# ── 2. Scale in native assay order ────────────────────────────────────────────
selected_peaks <- rownames(TKO_final_arc)[
  rownames(TKO_final_arc) %in% top_peaks$gene
]
TKO_final_arc <- ScaleData(TKO_final_arc, features = selected_peaks, model.use = "poisson")

# ── 3. Build peak_order and peak_ann_labels together ─────────────────────────
peak_df <- top_peaks %>%
  filter(gene %in% selected_peaks) %>%
  mutate(cluster = factor(cluster, levels = ident_order)) %>%
  arrange(cluster) %>%
  distinct(gene, .keep_all = TRUE)

peak_order      <- peak_df$gene
peak_ann_labels <- as.character(peak_df$cluster)
stopifnot(length(peak_order) == length(peak_ann_labels))

# ── 4. Order cells — drop any cell_type NOT in ident_order ───────────────────
cell_type_factor <- factor(TKO_final_arc$cell_type, levels = ident_order)
cells_keep       <- colnames(TKO_final_arc)[!is.na(cell_type_factor)]
cat("Dropped cells:", ncol(TKO_final_arc) - length(cells_keep), "\n")

cell_type_factor  <- droplevels(cell_type_factor[!is.na(cell_type_factor)])
cell_order        <- order(cell_type_factor)
cells_ordered     <- cells_keep[cell_order]
cell_types_ordered <- cell_type_factor[cell_order]   # ← defined here

# ── 5. Extract and clip scaled matrix ─────────────────────────────────────────
scaled_mat <- GetAssayData(TKO_final_arc, assay = "peaks", slot = "scale.data")
scaled_mat <- as.matrix(scaled_mat[peak_order, cells_ordered])
#scaled_mat[scaled_mat >  2] <-  2
#scaled_mat[scaled_mat < -2] <- -2

# ── 6. Annotations ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
col_ann <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  CellType = cell_types_ordered,
  col      = list(CellType = group_colors),
  show_annotation_name = FALSE
)

row_ann <- rowAnnotation(
  Archetype = peak_ann_labels,
  col       = list(Archetype = group_colors),
  show_annotation_name = FALSE,
  show_legend = FALSE
)
col_fun <- colorRamp2(c(-2.5, 0,1.5), c("#168082","white","#ED1F69"))

###Extended Data Figure 7a
Heatmap(
  scaled_mat,
  name              = "Z-score",
  col =              col_fun,
  cluster_rows      = FALSE,
  cluster_columns   = FALSE,
  show_row_names    = FALSE,
  show_column_names = FALSE,
  column_split      = cell_types_ordered,
  row_gap = unit(0.5, "mm"),
  column_gap =  unit(0.3, "mm"),
  row_split         = factor(peak_ann_labels, levels = ident_order),
  top_annotation    = col_ann,
  column_title_rot  = 45,
  use_raster        = TRUE
)
```

```{r width = 12, fig.height = 5}

Idents(TKO_final_arc) = "cell_type"

DefaultAssay(TKO_final_arc) = "peaks"

TKO_final_arc@active.ident <- factor(TKO_final_arc@active.ident, 
                            levels=c("nonNE2","Generalist nonNE","nonNE1","Intermediate","Stress","Neuroendocrine2","Generalist NE",
                              "Neuroendocrine1"))

###Figure 3b
Ascl1 = CoveragePlot(
  object = TKO_final_arc,
  region = "Ascl1",
  extend.upstream = 2000,
  extend.downstream = 2000,
  ymax = 100) 

Calca = CoveragePlot(
  object = TKO_final_arc,
  region = "Calca",
  extend.upstream = 1000,
  extend.downstream = 1000,
  ymax = 40)

Rest = CoveragePlot(
  object = TKO_final_arc,
  region = "chr5-77265000-77275000",
  extend.upstream = 1000,
  extend.downstream = 1000,
  ymax = 40)


Notch2 = CoveragePlot(
  object = TKO_final_arc,
  region = "chr3-98050000-98065000",
  extend.upstream = 500,
  extend.downstream = 500,
  ymax = 35)


Ascl1+Calca+Rest+Notch2 & scale_fill_manual(values = c("#f27a30","#ddd9d8","#f10c13","#4e8ee6","#3eab32","#8e403a","gray70","#cb76da"))
```

```{r width = 3, fig.height = 5}
Idents(TKO_final_arc) = "cell_type"
DefaultAssay(TKO_final_arc) = "SCT"

genes = c("Tcf7l2","Stat1","Grhl2","Nfe2l2","Runx1","Hes1","Yap1","Rest","Jun","Fos","Etv4","Fosl2","Ets1","Cebpb","Foxa2","Myc","Sox2","Insm1","Sox11","Nfib","Meis2","Nfatc2","Tcf12","Tcf4","Sox6","Zeb1","Egr1","Rorb","Ascl1")

TKO_final_arc@active.ident <- factor(TKO_final_arc@active.ident, 
                            levels=c("Neuroendocrine1","Generalist NE","Neuroendocrine2","Stress","Intermediate","nonNE1","Generalist nonNE","nonNE2"))

p1 = DotPlot(TKO_final_arc, features = genes, scale = TRUE, col.max = 2,col.min = -2,scale.max = 75, scale.by = "radius", idents = c("Neuroendocrine1", "Neuroendocrine2","Stress","Intermediate","nonNE1","nonNE2","Generalist NE","Generalist nonNE"), dot.min = 0,dot.scale = 5)+RotatedAxis() +coord_flip()+scale_color_gradient2(low = "#2166ac", mid = "#f7f7f7", high = "#b2182b")

TF_RNA_dotplot = p1+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, size = 10), axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9),legend.text = element_text(size = 12), legend.title = element_text(size = 12)) +xlab("") +ylab("")

###Figure 3e
TF_RNA_dotplot

DefaultAssay(TKO_final_arc) = "chromvar"

motif.name <- ConvertMotifID(TKO_final_arc@assays$peaks@motifs@motif.names, name = c("TCF7L2","STAT1","GRHL2","NFE2L2","RUNX1","HES1","YAP1","JUN","FOS","ETV4","FOSL2","ETS1","CEBPB","FOXA2","MYC","SOX2","INSM1","SOX11","NFIB","MEIS2","NFATC2","TCF12","TCF4","SOX6","ZEB1","EGR1","RORB","ASCL1"))

labels = c("TCF7L2","STAT1","GRHL2","NFE2L2","RUNX1","HES1","YAP1","JUN","FOS","ETV4","FOSL2","ETS1","CEBPB","FOXA2","MYC","SOX2","INSM1","SOX11","NFIB","MEIS2","NFATC2","TCF12","TCF4","SOX6","ZEB1","EGR1","RORB","ASCL1")

#replace NA with correct motif name
motif.name[4] = "MA0150.2"
motif.name[7] = "MA0090.3"
motif.name[18] ="MA0869.1"
motif.name[22] = "MA0521.1"
motif.name[24] = "MA0515.1"

P2= DotPlot(TKO_final_arc, features = c(motif.name), scale = TRUE, col.max = 2,col.min = -2,scale.max = 75, scale.by = "radius", dot.min = 0,dot.scale = 5)+RotatedAxis() +coord_flip()+scale_color_gradient2(low = "#7e410f", mid = "#f7f7f7", high = "#42106e")

P2$data$features.plot = factor(P2$data$features.plot, 
                                      levels = motif.name, 
                                      labels = labels)

TF_motif_dotplot = P2+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, size = 10), axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9),legend.text = element_text(size = 12), legend.title = element_text(size = 12))+xlab("") +ylab("")

###Figure 3d
TF_motif_dotplot
```

```{r width = 4, fig.height = 5}

#correlation between gene activity and gene expression
Arc_marker_genes <- read_csv("/labs/julsage/Debbie/multiome_data/analysis_2/Arc.marker_genes.csv")

marker_genes = AverageExpression(
  TKO_final_arc,
  assays = "SCT",
  features = Arc_marker_genes$gene,
  return.seurat = TRUE,
  group.by = "cell_type",
  add.ident = NULL,
  layer =  "counts",
  verbose = TRUE)

marker_genes_mat = as.data.frame(marker_genes@assays$SCT$data)

marker_genes_mat = scale(t(marker_genes_mat))
marker_genes_mat = t(marker_genes_mat)


marker_activity= AverageExpression(
  TKO_final_arc,
  assays = "gene_activity",
  features = Arc_marker_genes$gene,
  return.seurat = TRUE,
  group.by = "cell_type",
  add.ident = NULL,
  layer = "data",
  verbose = TRUE)

marker_activity_mat = as.data.frame(marker_activity@assays$gene_activity$data)

marker_genes_mat = subset(marker_genes_mat, rownames(marker_genes_mat) %in% rownames(marker_activity_mat))

marker_activity_mat = scale(t(marker_activity_mat))
marker_activity_mat = t(marker_activity_mat)
colnames(marker_activity_mat) = c("Generalist NE_A","Generalist nonNE_A","Intermediate_A","Neuroendocrine1_A","Neuroendocrine2_A","nonNE1_A","nonNE2_A","Stress_A")

res <- rcorr(as.matrix(cbind(marker_genes_mat, marker_activity_mat)), type = "pearson")
# Extract only between-matrix correlations
n1 <- ncol(marker_genes_mat)
n2 <- ncol(marker_activity_mat)
corr_between <- res$r[1:n1, (n1+1):(n1+n2)]
p_between <- res$P[1:n1, (n1+1):(n1+n2)]

###Figure 3c
# Plot only cross-matrix correlations
corrplot(corr_between,
         is.corr = FALSE,          # since not a symmetric correlation matrix
         method = 'square',
         col = rev(brewer.pal(10, 'RdBu')),
         tl.col = 'black',
         p.mat = p_between,
         sig.level = 0.01,
         type = "lower",
         ,col.lim = c(-1, 1),
         addCoef.col = "black",   # add correlation values as text
         number.cex = 0.6,        # adjust text size
         number.digits = 2)


```

```{r}
# Fixed version - handles empty counts layer
calculate_chromatin_entropy <- function(signac_obj,
                                       atac_assay = "ATAC",
                                       use_variable_peaks = TRUE,
                                       n_peaks = 5000) {
  
  # Set the default assay
  DefaultAssay(signac_obj) <- atac_assay
  
  peak_matrix <- GetAssayData(signac_obj, assay = atac_assay, layer = "data")
  
  if (use_variable_peaks) {
    # Check if variable features already exist
    var_peaks <- VariableFeatures(signac_obj)
    
    if (length(var_peaks) == 0) {
      print("No variable features found. Computing variable features...")
      
      # Check if counts layer has data
      counts_data <- GetAssayData(signac_obj, assay = atac_assay, layer = "data")
      
      if (length(counts_data) == 0 || sum(counts_data) == 0) {
        # Counts layer is empty - use data layer instead
        print("Counts layer empty. Using data layer for feature selection...")
        
        # Calculate variance across cells for each peak
        peak_vars <- Matrix::rowVars(peak_matrix)
        names(peak_vars) <- rownames(peak_matrix)
        
        # Sort by variance and take top peaks
        var_peaks <- names(sort(peak_vars, decreasing = TRUE))
        
        print(paste("Selected", length(var_peaks), "peaks by variance"))
        
      } else {
        # Counts layer has data - use FindTopFeatures
        signac_obj <- FindTopFeatures(signac_obj, 
                                      assay = atac_assay,
                                      min.cutoff = 'q5')
        var_peaks <- VariableFeatures(signac_obj)
        print(paste("Found", length(var_peaks), "variable features"))
      }
    }
    
    # Subset to variable peaks
    var_peaks <- var_peaks[var_peaks %in% rownames(peak_matrix)]
    peak_matrix <- peak_matrix[head(var_peaks, n_peaks), ]
    
    print(paste("Using", nrow(peak_matrix), "variable peaks for entropy calculation"))
  }
  
  # Calculate entropy for each cell
  print("Calculating entropy scores...")
  entropy_scores <- apply(peak_matrix, 2, function(cell_peaks) {
    # Normalize to probabilities
    cell_peaks_sum <- sum(cell_peaks)
    
    if (cell_peaks_sum == 0) {
      return(0)  # Handle cells with no accessibility
    }
    
    cell_peaks <- cell_peaks / cell_peaks_sum
    cell_peaks <- cell_peaks[cell_peaks > 0]
    
    # Shannon entropy
    -sum(cell_peaks * log(cell_peaks))
  })
  
  # Normalize to 0-1
  entropy_norm <- (entropy_scores - min(entropy_scores)) / 
                  (max(entropy_scores) - min(entropy_scores))
  
  # Add to metadata
  signac_obj$chromatin_entropy <- entropy_scores
  signac_obj$chromatin_entropy_norm <- entropy_norm
  
  print("\nDone!")
  print(paste("Entropy range:", 
              round(min(entropy_scores), 3), "-", 
              round(max(entropy_scores), 3)))
  
  return(signac_obj)
}

# Run with your object
TKO_final_arc <- calculate_chromatin_entropy(
  signac_obj = TKO_final_arc,
  atac_assay = "peaks",  # Your ATAC assay name
  use_variable_peaks = TRUE,
  n_peaks = 5000
)

```

```{r}
# Function to prepare marker genes from your differential genes dataframe
prepare_marker_genes <- function(genes_df, 
                                 gene_col = "gene",      # column with gene names
                                 state_col = "cluster") { # column with cell state
  
  print(paste("Processing", nrow(genes_df), "pre-filtered differential genes"))
  
  # Split into list by cell state
  markers_list <- split(genes_df[[gene_col]], genes_df[[state_col]])
  
  # Print summary
  print("\nGenes per state:")
  for (state in names(markers_list)) {
    print(paste("  ", state, ":", length(markers_list[[state]]), "genes"))
  }
  
  # Get unique genes across all states
  all_genes <- unique(genes_df[[gene_col]])
  print(paste("\nTotal unique genes:", length(all_genes)))
  
  return(list(
    by_state = markers_list,
    all_genes = all_genes
  ))
}

# Modified decorrelation function with pre-computed markers
calculate_activity_expression_coupling <- function(signac_obj,
                                                   rna_assay = "RNA",
                                                   gene_activity_assay = "GeneActivity",
                                                   precomputed_markers = NULL,  # NEW: accepts prepared markers
                                                   use_state_specific = FALSE) { # NEW: option for analysis type
  
  # Get marker genes
  if (is.null(precomputed_markers)) {
    stop("Please provide precomputed_markers from prepare_marker_genes()")
  }
  
  if (use_state_specific) {
    # Use state-specific markers (provided as list)
    if (!is.list(precomputed_markers$by_state)) {
      stop("For state_specific analysis, provide output from prepare_marker_genes()")
    }
    marker_genes_list <- precomputed_markers$by_state
    analysis_type <- "state-specific"
  } else {
    # Use all unique marker genes
    marker_genes <- precomputed_markers$all_genes
    analysis_type <- "all markers"
  }
  
  print(paste("Calculating activity-expression coupling using", analysis_type))
  
  # Extract expression and activity data
  expr <- GetAssayData(signac_obj, assay = rna_assay, layer = "data")
  activity <- GetAssayData(signac_obj, assay = gene_activity_assay, layer = "data")
  
  if (!use_state_specific) {
    # Analysis across all marker genes
    common_genes <- intersect(marker_genes, intersect(rownames(expr), rownames(activity)))
    print(paste("Using", length(common_genes), "common marker genes"))
    
    if (length(common_genes) < 50) {
      warning("Very few common genes found. Check gene names match between assays.")
    }
    
    expr <- expr[common_genes, ]
    activity <- activity[common_genes, ]
    
    # Calculate per-cell correlation
    print("Computing per-cell correlations...")
    coupling_scores <- sapply(colnames(expr), function(cell) {
      cor(as.numeric(expr[, cell]), 
          as.numeric(activity[, cell]),
          method = "spearman")
    })
    
    # Handle NAs
    coupling_scores[is.na(coupling_scores)] <- 0
    
    # Invert so high score = high plasticity (low coupling)
    plasticity_from_decoupling <- 1 - coupling_scores
    
    signac_obj$activity_expression_coupling <- coupling_scores
    signac_obj$plasticity_decoupling <- plasticity_from_decoupling
    
    print("\nDone!")
    print(paste("Mean coupling:", round(mean(coupling_scores), 3)))
    print(paste("Mean plasticity (decoupling):", round(mean(plasticity_from_decoupling), 3)))
    
  } else {
    # State-specific analysis: calculate coupling using each state's markers
    print("Computing state-specific correlations for each cell...")
    
    cell_states <- unique(signac_obj@meta.data[[names(marker_genes_list)[1]]])
    
    # For each cell, calculate correlation using its own state's markers
    coupling_scores <- numeric(ncol(expr))
    names(coupling_scores) <- colnames(expr)
    
    # Get cell state assignments
    if ("cell_type" %in% colnames(signac_obj@meta.data)) {
      cell_state_col <- "cell_type"
    } else if ("celltype" %in% colnames(signac_obj@meta.data)) {
      cell_state_col <- "celltype"
    } else {
      stop("Cannot find cell state column. Please specify.")
    }
    
    cell_assignments <- signac_obj@meta.data[[cell_state_col]]
    
    for (state in names(marker_genes_list)) {
      state_cells <- which(cell_assignments == state)
      state_genes <- marker_genes_list[[state]]
      
      # Find common genes for this state
      common_genes <- intersect(state_genes, intersect(rownames(expr), rownames(activity)))
      
      if (length(common_genes) < 10) {
        warning(paste("Very few genes for state", state, "- skipping"))
        next
      }
      
      expr_state <- expr[common_genes, state_cells, drop = FALSE]
      activity_state <- activity[common_genes, state_cells, drop = FALSE]
      
      # Calculate correlation for each cell in this state
      for (cell in colnames(expr_state)) {
        coupling_scores[cell] <- cor(as.numeric(expr_state[, cell]),
                                     as.numeric(activity_state[, cell]),
                                     method = "spearman")
      }
    }
    
    coupling_scores[is.na(coupling_scores)] <- 0
    plasticity_from_decoupling <- 1 - coupling_scores
    
    signac_obj$activity_expression_coupling_statespecific <- coupling_scores
    signac_obj$plasticity_decoupling_statespecific <- plasticity_from_decoupling
    
    print("\nDone!")
    print(paste("Mean coupling:", round(mean(coupling_scores), 3)))
    print(paste("Mean plasticity (decoupling):", round(mean(plasticity_from_decoupling), 3)))
  }
  
  # Summary by cell type if available
  if ("cell_type" %in% colnames(signac_obj@meta.data) | 
      "celltype" %in% colnames(signac_obj@meta.data)) {
    
    cell_col <- ifelse("cell_type" %in% colnames(signac_obj@meta.data), 
                      "cell_type", "celltype")
    
    print("\nCoupling by cell state:")
    coupling_by_state <- aggregate(coupling_scores ~ signac_obj@meta.data[[cell_col]], 
                                   FUN = mean)
    colnames(coupling_by_state) <- c("State", "Mean_Coupling")
    coupling_by_state <- coupling_by_state[order(coupling_by_state$Mean_Coupling), ]
    print(coupling_by_state, row.names = FALSE)
    
    print("\nPlasticity (decoupling) by cell state:")
    plasticity_by_state <- aggregate(plasticity_from_decoupling ~ signac_obj@meta.data[[cell_col]], 
                                    FUN = mean)
    colnames(plasticity_by_state) <- c("State", "Mean_Plasticity")
    plasticity_by_state <- plasticity_by_state[order(plasticity_by_state$Mean_Plasticity, 
                                                      decreasing = TRUE), ]
    print(plasticity_by_state, row.names = FALSE)
  }
  
  return(signac_obj)
}
#USAGE
markers_genes <- prepare_marker_genes(
  genes_df = Arc_marker_genes,
  gene_col = "gene",        # YOUR gene column name
  state_col = "cluster"     # YOUR cell state column name
)

# Calculate coupling using ALL marker genes
# This measures overall correlation between gene activity and expression
TKO_final_arc <- calculate_activity_expression_coupling(
  signac_obj = TKO_final_arc,
  rna_assay = "decontXcounts",
  gene_activity_assay = "gene_activity",
  precomputed_markers = markers_genes,
  use_state_specific = FALSE  # Use all genes
)

# Create composite plasticity score
TKO_final_arc$plasticity_composite <- 
  scale(TKO_final_arc$chromatin_entropy_norm) +
  scale(TKO_final_arc$plasticity_decoupling)
```

```{r width = 3, fig.height = 5}
plot_df <- TKO_final_arc@meta.data %>%
  filter(!cell_type %in% c("Generalist NE", "Generalist nonNE")) %>%
  mutate(
    plot_group = case_when(
      cell_type == "Intermediate"                              ~ "Intermediate",
      TRUE                                                     ~ "Other"
    ),
    plot_order = case_when(
      plot_group == "Other"        ~ 1,
      plot_group == "Intermediate" ~ 2
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(plot_order) %>%
  mutate(plot_group = factor(plot_group, levels = c("Other","Intermediate")))


###Figure 3c
ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = as.numeric(scale(chromatin_entropy)), 
                    y = as.numeric(scale(plasticity_decoupling)),
                    color = plot_group, size = plot_group)) +

  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black", linewidth = 0.4, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "black", linewidth = 0.4, linetype = "dashed") +

  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +



  scale_color_manual(values = c("Other"        = "grey80",
                                 "NE"           = "grey80",
                                 "Intermediate" = "#2166ac"),
                     name   = "") +
  scale_size_manual(values  = c("Other"        = 0.8,
                                 "NE"           = 1.0,
                                 "Intermediate" = 1.2),
                    guide   = "none") +

  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3, alpha = 1))) +

  labs(
    x     = "Chromatin entropy",
    y     = "Gene-activity expression decoupling",
    title = "Chromatin entropy vs decoupling"
  ) +

  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

```

```{r}
library(rstatix)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(effsize)

make_violin_multigroup <- function(data, score_col, y_label,
                                   group_col = "cell_type",
                                   ref_group  = "Intermediate",
                                   colors     = c("Neuroendocrine1" = "#cb76da",
                                                  "Neuroendocrine2" = "#8e403a",
                                                  "Stress"          = "#3eab32",
                                                  "Generalist NE"  = "gray50",
                                                  "Intermediate"    = "#4e8ee6",
                                                  "nonNE1"          = "#f10c13",
                                                  "nonNE2"          = "#f27a30",
                                                  "Generalist nonNE" = "gray70")) {

  # Pairwise Wilcoxon vs ref_group + BH correction
  pair_res <- data %>%
    rstatix::pairwise_wilcox_test(
      as.formula(paste(score_col, "~", group_col)),
      ref.group       = ref_group,
      p.adjust.method = "BH"
    ) %>%
    filter(group1 == ref_group | group2 == ref_group) %>%
    mutate(other = ifelse(group1 == ref_group, group2, group1))

  # Cliff's delta vs ref_group
  cd_res <- lapply(pair_res$other, function(ct) {
    x <- data[[score_col]][data[[group_col]] == ref_group]
    y <- data[[score_col]][data[[group_col]] == ct]
    cd <- cliff.delta(y, x)
    data.frame(other     = ct,
               delta     = round(as.numeric(cd$estimate), 3),
               magnitude = as.character(cd$magnitude))
  }) %>% bind_rows()

  pair_res <- pair_res %>%
    left_join(cd_res, by = "other") %>%
    mutate(
      label     = paste0("δ=", delta, " (", magnitude, ")\nFDR=",
                         formatC(p.adj, format = "e", digits = 2)),
      cell_type = other
    ) %>%
    left_join(
      data %>% dplyr::group_by(.data[[group_col]]) %>%
        dplyr::summarize(y_annot = max(.data[[score_col]], na.rm=TRUE) * 1.05,
                         .groups = "drop") %>%
        dplyr::rename(cell_type = all_of(group_col)),
      by = "cell_type"
    )

  ggplot(data, aes(x = .data[[group_col]],
                   y = .data[[score_col]],
                   fill = .data[[group_col]])) +
    geom_violin(width = 0.7, scale = "width", trim = FALSE) +
    geom_boxplot(notch = TRUE, width = 0.25, color = "black",
                 alpha = 0.5, size = 0.5, lwd = 0.5) +
    geom_text(data = pair_res,
              aes(x = cell_type, y = y_annot, label = label),
              inherit.aes = FALSE,
              size = 3.2, vjust = 0, lineheight = 0.9) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = colors) +
    scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.22))) +
    theme_classic() +
    xlab("") +
    ylab(y_label) +
    theme(legend.position  = "none",
          text             = element_text(size = 13),
          axis.text.x      = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
}

###Extended Data Figure 7c
epigenetic_plasticity_score = make_violin_multigroup(
  data      = TKO_final_arc@meta.data %>%
                filter(!cell_type %in% c("Generalist NE","Generalist nonNE"))%>%
mutate(cell_type = factor(cell_type, levels = c("Neuroendocrine1","Neuroendocrine2","Stress","Intermediate","nonNE1","nonNE2"))),
  score_col = "plasticity_composite",
  y_label   = "Epigenetic Plasticity score",
  ref_group = "Intermediate"
)

epigenetic_plasticity_score
```
